_meta.description: Service dependency map for Bob Mac Mini M4 (Symphony AI-Server). Used by Cortex watchdog dashboard to show impacts and safe recovery guidance when a service is degraded.
_meta.notes: safe_recovery_command values are suggestions only — never auto-executed.

redis.purpose: Message queue and shared cache — required by almost all services
redis.impact_summary: All containers lose cache/queue; services reconnect automatically on restart
redis.notes: Brief interruption to all dependents; they reconnect automatically. Do not restart under high write load.

cortex.purpose: Central AI brain — analysis, memory, dashboards, reply drafting
cortex.impact_summary: Reply drafting, client intel, and dashboard unavailable
cortex.notes: Stateless — restarts cleanly. Memory DB is persisted in data/cortex/brain.db.

x-intake.purpose: Receives iMessages via BlueBubbles, queues for AI analysis, routes replies
x-intake.impact_summary: Incoming iMessages not processed; reply suggestions go stale
x-intake.notes: Queue is persisted in SQLite; messages received while down are not lost (BlueBubbles buffers them).

openclaw.purpose: Agent orchestrator — runs AI agents, auto-responder, briefing delivery
openclaw.impact_summary: AI agents offline; auto-responder and briefings paused
openclaw.notes: Stateless agent runner. Briefing state persisted in data/openclaw/.

clawwork.purpose: AI workflow execution engine used by OpenClaw agents
clawwork.impact_summary: OpenClaw agents cannot execute multi-step workflows
clawwork.notes: Restarts cleanly. OpenClaw will reconnect automatically.

bluebubbles.purpose: iMessage bridge — receives and sends iMessages on behalf of Bob
bluebubbles.impact_summary: All iMessage send/receive stops; Bob goes dark on iMessage
bluebubbles.notes: Mac app — not a Docker container. Check Activity Monitor. Reopen from Applications if needed.

ollama.purpose: Local LLM inference server — used by Cortex for reply drafting
ollama.impact_summary: AI draft generation falls back to templates; analysis degrades
ollama.notes: Mac app. Cortex degrades gracefully to template replies when Ollama is offline.

docker.purpose: Container runtime — all Docker services depend on it
docker.impact_summary: All Docker services offline — complete system shutdown
docker.notes: Only run docker-recover.sh if docker ps fails for 30+ seconds. See ops/runbooks/ for procedure.

vpn.purpose: WireGuard VPN — used by polymarket-bot for external API access
vpn.notes: Container-level WireGuard. Restart reconnects in seconds.

polymarket-bot.impact_summary: Polymarket trading paused; open positions maintained
polymarket-bot.notes: Stateless between runs. Positions are held by Polymarket, not the bot.

notification-hub.purpose: Routes alerts from all services to iMessage/other channels
notification-hub.impact_summary: System alerts not delivered; silent failures possible

voice-receptionist.purpose: Handles inbound calls, records voicemail, routes to Bob
voice-receptionist.impact_summary: Inbound calls unanswered or go to default voicemail

email-monitor.purpose: Monitors Gmail, surfaces important emails to Cortex dashboard
email-monitor.impact_summary: Email dashboard goes stale; no new email alerts

calendar-agent.purpose: Syncs Google Calendar, surfaces events to Cortex dashboard

intel-feeds.purpose: Collects market intelligence and news via RSS/APIs

x-alpha-collector.purpose: Collects alpha signals from X.com (Twitter) for analysis
x-alpha-collector.impact_summary: X.com data collection paused; feed goes stale

tailscale.purpose: Secure mesh VPN — remote access to Bob from anywhere
tailscale.impact_summary: Remote access to Bob unavailable (local access unaffected)
tailscale.notes: Do not run 'tailscale up' if already connected — use 'tailscale status' to diagnose first.

impacts: all containers affected by last recovery event
containers.impact_summary: Watchdog performed a bulk container recovery
containers.notes: This entry reflects a watchdog-level container recovery event, not a single service.

task-runner.purpose: Scheduled automation — runs Python scripts, updates state files
task-runner.impact_summary: Automated tasks paused; state files go stale
task-runner.notes: Host-level LaunchDaemon. Check heartbeat file age — if >10 min stale, restart.

bob-watchdog.purpose: Monitors Docker containers, restarts unhealthy ones, recovers Docker engine
bob-watchdog.impact_summary: No automatic container recovery while watchdog is offline
bob-watchdog.notes: Host-level LaunchDaemon. Check heartbeat file — if stale, restart via launchctl.

cortex-autobuilder.purpose: Watches cortex/ for code changes, auto-rebuilds and restarts cortex
cortex-autobuilder.impact_summary: Code changes to cortex/ not auto-deployed
